name: example-kanban-board
title: Kanban Board
description:
Kanban / task board with columns (To do / In progress / In review / Done),
draggable-looking cards, assignee avatars, swimlanes, and a top filter
bar. Use when the brief mentions "kanban", "task board", "sprint board",
"trello".

description_i18n.zh-CN: 看板/任务面板，包含多个列（待办/进行中/审核中/已完成）、可拖动样式的卡片、成员头像、泳道和顶部筛选栏。当需求中提到'kanban'、'task board'、'sprint board'、'trello'、'看板'时使用。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 看板/任務面板，包含多個欄位（待辦/進行中/審核中/已完成）、可拖曳樣式的卡片、成員頭像、泳道和頂部篩選列。當需求中提到'kanban'、'task board'、'sprint board'、'trello'、'看板'時使用。
description_i18n.ja: かんばん/タスクボード。列（To do / In progress / In review / Done）、ドラッグ可能なカード、担当者アバター、スイムレーン、上部フィルターバーを含みます。'kanban'、'task board'、'sprint board'、'trello'、'看板'が言及されたときに使用します。
description_i18n.ko: 칸반/작업 보드. 여러 열(할 일/진행 중/검토 중/완료), 드래그 가능한 카드, 담당자 아바타, 스윔레인, 상단 필터 바를 포함합니다. 요구사항에 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello', 'kanban board'이 언급될 때 사용하세요.
description_i18n.de: Kanban- / Aufgabentafel mit Spalten (To do / In progress / In review / Done), ziehbaren Karten, Zuweisungs-Avataren, Swimlanes und einer oberen Filterleiste. Verwenden Sie es, wenn 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' oder 'kanban board' erwähnt werden.
description_i18n.fr: Tableau kanban / tâches avec colonnes (To do / In progress / In review / Done), cartes déplaçables, avatars des assignés, swimlanes et barre de filtre supérieure. À utiliser lorsque 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' ou 'kanban board' sont mentionnés.
description_i18n.ru: Канбан-доска / доска задач с колонками (To do / In progress / In review / Done), перетаскиваемыми карточками, аватарами исполнителей, swimlanes и верхней панелью фильтров. Используйте, когда упоминаются 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello', 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.es: Tablero kanban / de tareas con columnas (To do / In progress / In review / Done), tarjetas arrastrables, avatares de asignados, swimlanes y barra de filtros superior. Úselo cuando se mencione 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' o 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Quadro kanban / de tarefas com colunas (To do / In progress / In review / Done), cartões arrastáveis, avatares de responsáveis, swimlanes e barra de filtros superior. Use quando o brief mencionar 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' ou 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.it: Bacheca kanban / attività con colonne (To do / In progress / In review / Done), schede trascinabili, avatar degli assegnatari, swimlanes e barra filtro superiore. Da usare quando il brief menziona 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' o 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.vi: Bảng kanban / công việc với các cột (To do / In progress / In review / Done), thẻ có thể kéo, avatar người phụ trách, swimlanes và thanh lọc ở trên. Sử dụng khi brief đề cập 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' hoặc 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.pl: Tablica kanban / zadań z kolumnami (To do / In progress / In review / Done), przeciągalnymi kartami, awatarami przypisanych osób, swimlanes i górnym paskiem filtrów. Użyj, gdy brief wspomina 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' lub 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.id: Papan kanban / tugas dengan kolom (To do / In progress / In review / Done), kartu yang dapat diseret, avatar penugasan, swimlanes, dan bilah filter atas. Gunakan ketika brief menyebutkan 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello', atau 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.nl: Kanban- / takenbord met kolommen (To do / In progress / In review / Done), versleepbare kaarten, avatars van toegewezenen, swimlanes en een bovenste filterbalk. Gebruik wanneer de brief 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' of 'kanban board' noemt.
description_i18n.ar: لوحة كانبان / المهام مع أعمدة (To do / In progress / In review / Done)، وبطاقات قابلة للسحب، وصور رمزية للمكلفين، وممرات سباحة، وشريط تصفية علوي. استخدمها عندما يذكر الموجز 'kanban' أو 'task board' أو 'sprint board' أو 'trello' أو 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.tr: Sütunlu (To do / In progress / In review / Done) kanban / görev panosu, sürüklenebilir kartlar, atanan kişi avatarları, swimlane'ler ve üst filtre çubuğu içerir. Brief'te 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' veya 'kanban board' geçtiğinde kullanın.
description_i18n.uk: Канбан-дошка / дошка завдань зі стовпцями (To do / In progress / In review / Done), картками, що перетягуються, аватарами виконавців, swimlanes та верхньою панеллю фільтрів. Використовуйте, коли в брифі згадуються 'kanban', 'task board', 'sprint board', 'trello' або 'kanban board'.
description_i18n.en:
Kanban / task board with columns (To do / In progress / In review / Done),
draggable-looking cards, assignee avatars, swimlanes, and a top filter
bar. Use when the brief mentions "kanban", "task board", "sprint board",
"trello".

query.en: Make me a kanban board for a 5-person growth squad mid-sprint — backlog, doing, review, done.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Make me a kanban board for a 5-person growth squad mid-sprint — backlog, doing, review, done.
